arts.ttl: Is Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany concerned by late Holstein Kiel attacking surge? “No”
arts.sum: When you make 5 substitutions in the second half, it can happen that sometimes you’re one step too late or you don’t defend some situations 100% as you did in the first half. Bayern Munich demonstrated an array of attacking power and interesting tactical set ups that allowed the team to steamrollHolstein Kiel, with the team 4-0 up at halftime and running up the scoreline to a 6-1 finish today.

arts.ttl: Paul Wanner on Bayern Munich’s superstars: “They welcomed me warmly”
arts.sum: After this season, Bayern Munich is going to welcome back Paul Wanner from his loan stint at FC Heidenheim, but the club once welcomed the youngster for the first time when he was just 16-years-old. I can just say that it was a really great time at the beginning and like I said, they welcomed me really warmly and it was a really good fit.”
